title: MeshStress
description: MeshStress: Shell and membrane stresses at a discrete location in the Panel/FEMesh.

SXX.description: Normal stress in x-direction. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

SYY.description: Normal stress in y-direction. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

SXY.description: Normal stress in xy-direction. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

TXX.description: Shear stress in x-direction. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

TYY.description: Shear stress in y-direction. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

Principal_1.description: Principal stress in first principal direction. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

Principal_2.description: Principal stress in second principal direction. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

Principal_1_2.description: Principal stress in middle principal direction. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

LayerPosition.description: Position within the element thickness that result is extracted from, normalised to 1. I.e. 0 = lower surface, 0.5 = middle, 1 = top surface.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
